description.ko: 바다 가장 깊은 곳에서 생물 발광 생명체들이 펼치는 평화로운 춤을 통해 열수구 주변에 빛의 대성당을 형성합니다.
description.en: A peaceful dance of bioluminescent life in the deepest parts of the ocean, creating a cathedral of light around hydrothermal vents.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Abyssal Cathedral.' A massive swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise bioluminescent organisms form a glowing spire around ancient #006994 hydrothermal vents. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow, while translucent #48D1CC cyan jellyfish-like forms pulsate in rhythmic unison, casting soft light on the dark seabed. Photorealistic fluid dynamics, high-pressure deep sea atmosphere, and volumetric light rays filtering through the abyssal currents. 8k resolution, capturing the peaceful, transparent life of the midnight zone.
